en_title: After Starring in an AI-Generated Video for Prada, Hideo Kojima Says 'Maybe AI Could Create Art, but While I Live, I Don't Think I'll See It'
cn_title: 小岛秀夫谈AI：有生之年看不到AI创造艺术
subtitle: AI艺术？不感兴趣
opus_summary: 小岛秀夫因出演Prada AI生成视频遭批评，称有生之年看不到AI创造艺术，但此前曾称AI是“朋友”，可用于提升效率。

paragraphs.en: Hideo Kojima has issued a comment on the use of AI after some had criticized his appearance in an AI-generated video for Prada.
paragraphs.cn: 小岛秀夫近日就AI的使用发表了评论，此前他因出演Prada的AI生成视频而受到批评。

paragraphs.en: Late last month, the legendary developer of the Metal Gear and Death Stranding video game franchises appeared alongside Danish filmmaker Nicholas Winding Refn in a 90-second teaser for Prada Mode, which took over Chelsea Hotel in New York last week. In the video, Kojima and Refn arrive by spaceship at Chelsea Hotel having crash landed on a planet and escaping the clutches of an alien.
paragraphs.cn: 上月底，这位《潜龙谍影》和《死亡搁浅》系列的传奇制作人与丹麦电影人Nicholas Winding Refn一同出现在Prada Mode的90秒预告片中，该活动上周在纽约切尔西酒店举行。视频中，小岛和Refn乘坐飞船抵达切尔西酒店，他们迫降在一颗星球上，并逃脱了外星人的魔爪。

paragraphs.en: The teaser was met with a significant amount of backlash on social media from Kojima fans, some of whom expressed confusion at his appearance in what they called “AI slop.” “Heartbreaking to see such great artists resort to generative AI slop,” one person said. “Really disappointed to see @HIDEO_KOJIMA_EN involved with this bulls**t,” another said. “Hey @HIDEO_KOJIMA_EN I'm a huge fan, love everything you've ever done, except for this. Please never involve yourself with AI slop ever again. You're better than this,” another commented.
paragraphs.cn: 该预告片在社交媒体上遭到了小岛粉丝的大量抵制，一些人对他出现在他们所谓的「AI垃圾」中表示困惑。「看到如此伟大的艺术家沦落到使用生成式AI垃圾，令人心碎，」一人说道。「看到@HIDEO_KOJIMA_EN参与这种狗屁东西，真的很失望，」另一人说。「嘿@HIDEO_KOJIMA_EN，我是你的超级粉丝，喜欢你做的一切，除了这个。请永远别再参与AI垃圾了，你不该这样，」另一位评论道。

paragraphs.en: While Kojima has yet to address the backlash directly, he spoke generally about AI in an article published on The Washington Post about the Prada takeover of Chelsea Hotel. The 62-year-old said he was “not interested” in AI, insisting he didn’t think he’d see AI create art in his lifetime.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然小岛尚未直接回应这些批评，但他在《华盛顿邮报》一篇关于Prada接管切尔西酒店的文章中泛泛地谈到了AI。这位62岁的制作人表示他对AI「不感兴趣」，坚称他认为自己有生之年看不到AI创造艺术。

paragraphs.en: “Art is life. But in 50 years, 100 years, I don’t know. Maybe AI could create art, but while I live, I don’t think I’ll see it. I’m not interested in it,” he said. “We’ll find a good way, a good path to how we use technology, and it’s really up to young people on how we use it.”
paragraphs.cn: 「艺术就是生命。但50年后、100年后，我不知道。也许AI能创造艺术，但在我有生之年，我不认为我能看到。我对此不感兴趣，」他说。「我们会找到一条好的方式、好的路径来使用技术，而如何使用它，真的取决于年轻人。」

paragraphs.en: The Washington Post reports that Kojima also said AI works best as a ‘janitor for creative chores, and that humans need to stay in the room where art gets made.’ But his latest comments have prompted an appraisal of Kojima’s past on-the-record thoughts about generative AI.
paragraphs.cn: 据《华盛顿邮报》报道，小岛还表示AI最适合充当「创意杂务的清洁工」，人类需要留在创作艺术的房间里。但他最近的言论促使人们重新审视小岛过去关于生成式AI的公开想法。

paragraphs.en: “Rather than having AI create visuals or anything like that, I’m more interested in using AI in the control systems,” Kojima told CNN in December last year. "By using AI, enemy behavior could change based on the player’s experience, actions and patterns. That kind of dynamic response would make much deeper gameplay possible.”
paragraphs.cn: 「比起让AI创造画面之类的东西，我更感兴趣的是在控制系统中使用AI，」小岛去年12月告诉CNN。「通过使用AI，敌人的行为可以根据玩家的经验、行动和模式而变化。这种动态响应将使更深层次的游戏玩法成为可能。」

paragraphs.en: Also last year, Kojima told Wired Japan that he sees “a future where [he stays] one step ahead; creating together with AI.” He even referred to AI as a “friend,” suggesting it could be used to boost efficiency.
paragraphs.cn: 同样在去年，小岛告诉《连线》日本版，他看到了「一个（他）保持领先的未来；与AI共同创作」。他甚至将AI称为「朋友」，暗示它可以用来提高效率。

paragraphs.en: In October, Kojima cautioned against the industry's preoccupation with remaking or expanding existing franchises, telling Rolling Stone it was creatively "dangerous" not to explore new things. He suggested that "in the future, remakes and sequels will be made by AI."
paragraphs.cn: 去年10月，小岛警告业界不要沉迷于重制或扩展现有系列，他告诉《滚石》杂志，不去探索新事物在创意上是「危险的」。他暗示「未来，重制和续作将由AI制作」。

paragraphs.en: Ultimately, it sounds like Kojima is indeed interested in AI, but for certain use cases. Using AI for creating art, though, he doesn’t sound particularly interested in that. It will be interesting to see if Kojima uses generative AI for the development of upcoming Xbox game, OD, or upcoming PlayStation game, Physint, and, if so, in which ways.
paragraphs.cn: 归根结底，小岛似乎确实对AI感兴趣，但仅限于某些用例。至于用AI创造艺术，他听起来并不特别感兴趣。有趣的是，小岛是否会在即将推出的Xbox游戏《OD》或即将推出的PlayStation游戏《Physint》的开发中使用生成式AI，如果使用，又会以何种方式。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。在Twitter上关注他@wyp100。可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。
